asset.title: Two Client Live Sync
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates real-time synchronization between two clients and an active agent. The step-by-step annotations guide the viewer through the flow, though the initial layout is dense.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows live message sync and agent-driven spreadsheet updates across two clients.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the full sequence from message input to agent execution and live updates.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode UI, though the dual-pane layout feels slightly crowded.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the core product story of collaborative spreadsheets and agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture with helpful zoom-ins to highlight specific actions.

legibility.evidence: Text is small in the full view but readable during zoomed-in steps.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating collaborative financial modeling workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the latency and behavior of live synchronization.

observedEvidence: Agent cell locking and value updates

defects.observed: The side-by-side view makes the text and spreadsheet cells small and difficult to read initially.
defects.fix: Increase the default zoom level or crop closer to the active workspace areas.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's real-time synchronization in action as Client A triggers a server-led agent to reconcile Q3 financial data across both clients instantly.
